parsed.availability_comment: Missed IPL 2025 with calf injury and later rehab reports said knee surgery/ongoing recovery; early-season availability remains uncertain.
parsed.availability_note: Retained for IPL 2026, but official/reputable reports still place him in post-surgery rehab as late as Dec 2025; no clear March 2026 all-clear found.
parsed.followup_reason: Need late March/April 2026 squad-sheet or franchise fitness confirmation; no fresh official all-clear located despite 2026 retention.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Faces role competition from Shami, Avesh, Mayank, Akash Singh and Prince Yadav rather than overseas-slot pressure.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot rules do not affect selection. Competition is with Indian pace options.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained for 2026, but recent rehab/injury context and domestic pace depth make him non-lock first-choice.
